prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task isn’t getting any smaller by waiting—and honestly, it’s probably not as scary as your mind is making it out to be right now. The hardest part is starting, and once you do, momentum will carry you further than you think. Just take one small step. One action. One minute of focus. Progress beats perfection every time. You’re capable, you’re ready, and you’re stronger than the resistance you’re feeling. Now go—start. Future you will be so proud you did. 💪✨
